author: kyriakos.c1_91872
content:
👋 after a long break I managed to get back to actually deploying xatu inhouse... I've made some good progress but I think I've done _something_ wrong 🙂 

Most of the tables are populated in clickhouse, apart from the libp2p_... ones. My new best friend (claude) says there used to be a cl-mimicry command that was generating the data used to populate those tables, but that's no longer there. 

I picked up on that and found that the command was removed at 1e7e750e8ad8f12704c30c86dbef1c49b864483a "Remove cl-mimicry command (clmimicry is now just a wrapper package for tysm)". I went looking for tysm in the ethpandaops github org with little luck so far. Can you please point me to the right repo ? Is there an alternative way to get p2p data in clickhouse?
